ValidationRule.description: Email and Phone are mandatory from Demo stage onwards.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( OR( ISPICKVAL(StageName, 'Demo'), ISPICKVAL(StageName, 'Negotiation'), ISPICKVAL(StageName, 'Quote Acceptance'), ISPICKVAL(StageName, 'Funds (Negotiation)'), ISPICKVAL(StageName, 'Advance Paid'), ISPICKVAL(StageName, 'Closed Won') ), OR( ISBLANK(Email__c), ISBLANK(Phone__c) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Email and Phone are required from the Demo stage onwards.
